name: joel-plugins
description: Sia Joel's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: notebooklm-learning
plugins.description: Build NotebookLM-powered learning notebooks from any topic. Full workflow: concept mapping, notebook creation, YouTube + web research, source loading, dimension-based deep querying, and comprehensive MD/HTML output.

plugins.name: agent-builder
plugins.description: Guides users through building AI Agents from scratch via a 3-phase process: Workflow Discovery, Automation Audit, and Agent Design with Blueprint.

plugins.name: second-brain-learning
plugins.description: Learn any topic by fetching sources with defuddle, ingesting into the Second Brain wiki, and synthesizing a structured output MD. Fully local — no external notebooks needed.
